name: follows-system
description: Follower / following relations between users plus a generic 'follow this profile' table for non-user entities (e.g. photo profiles, clip profiles). Includes view counters.
postInstall: 1. Run the DB migration to create user_follows, user_views and photo_profile_follows tables
2. Use follow(userId, targetUserId) for user→user follows
3. Use followPhotoProfile(userId, profileSlug) for tracking external profiles (TikTok users, photo collections, etc.)
4. <FollowList kind='followers' userId={...} /> renders a paginated list with avatars
